name: Mosyle
description: Apple Mobile Device Management (MDM) solution for managing iPads, iPhones, Macs, and Apple TVs in educational and enterprise environments.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Mosyle admin console
2. Go to Organization > API Integration
3. Enable the API and generate an Access Token
4. Copy the Access Token
5. Enter the token along with your admin email and password

credentialFields.label: Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: API access token from Organization > API Integration

credentialFields.label: Admin Email
credentialFields.helpText: Email address of an admin user for API authentication

credentialFields.label: Admin Password
credentialFields.helpText: Password for the admin user account

checks.name: Device List
checks.description: Retrieve a comprehensive list of all managed devices from Mosyle, including iPads, iPhones, Macs, and Apple TVs with their security status and configuration details.

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Identify devices that meet security requirements including supervision status, encryption, and compliance with organizational security policies.
